subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Us, and We have hearkened unto what thou didst call out to God, and to My loved ones who are there, and We have answered thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک و سمعنا ما نادیت به الله من قبلک و احبائی فی هناک و اجبناکم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
